kinpaku-gold.description: Primary accent. CTAs, wordmark, active state, live picker borders, key rules.

verdigris-patina.description: Secondary accent. Improved states, live indicators, focus rings, contrast against gold.

lacquer-black.description: Default page ground. Warm mineral black, never pure #000.

neutral-text.description: Neutral white/gray text and utility stops shared by dark docs, live overlay, and light-mode chrome.

light-paper.description: Light theme surfaces, ink, and rules from site/styles/kinpaku-tokens.css.

command-category.description: Homepage proof modules use a constrained category palette for command groups, not generic decoration.

vermilion-warning.description: Errors, anti-pattern warnings, live picker exit hover.

positive-success.description: Success and accepted states: confirmation rows, diff additions, and positive status badges.

wordmark.purpose: IMPECCABLE lockup only. Alumni Sans at weight 400.

headline.purpose: Section h2. Alumni Sans at weight 300, heavier than display.

title.purpose: Panel and card headings (h3). Albert Sans.

body.purpose: Long copy. Albert Sans, line-height 1.8, max 65–75ch.

eyebrow.purpose: Short mono labels above titles. Uppercase, tracked.

mono.purpose: Command names, audit lines, table headers.

shadows.name: CTA Lift
shadows.purpose: Primary button hover lift on large CTAs.

shadows.name: Picker Halo
shadows.purpose: Live mode global and contextual picker bars.

motion.name: ks-ease
motion.purpose: Default kit easing for color, border, and transform transitions.

code.purpose: Inline code, terminal chips, tiny badges.

controlMd.purpose: Live overlay buttons and segmented controls.

xl.purpose: Picker bars, compact frames, and small visual shells.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Filled kinpaku CTA on lacquer. Both .ks-button and .ks-button-primary required.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; min-height: 52px; padding: 0 28px; font-family: "Albert Sans", "Avenir Next", "Helvetica Neue", Arial, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.96rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1; color: oklch(4% 0.004 95); background: oklch(84% 0.19 80.46); border: 1px solid oklch(84% 0.19 80.46); border-radius: 2px; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 180ms cubic-bezier(0.2, 0.8, 0.2, 1), background-color 180ms cubic-bezier(0.2, 0.8, 0.2, 1), border-color 180ms cubic-bezier(0.2, 0.8, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: oklch(86% 0.07 84); border-color: oklch(86% 0.07 84); transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(0); background: oklch(77% 0.13 82); border-color: oklch(77% 0.13 82); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(70% 0.12 188); outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; min-height: 52px; padding: 0 28px; font-family: "Albert Sans", "Avenir Next", "Helvetica Neue", Arial, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.96rem; font-weight: 500; color: oklch(84% 0.19 80.46); background: transparent; border: 1px solid oklch(84% 0.19 80.46); border-radius: 2px; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 180ms cubic-bezier(0.2, 0.8, 0.2, 1), background-color 180ms cubic-bezier(0.2, 0.8, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: oklch(77% 0.14 82 / 0.08); transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(70% 0.12 188); outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Raised lacquer field with gold hairline border, patina focus.
components.css: .ds-input-text { width: 100%; min-height: 46px; padding: 0 14px; font-family: "Albert Sans", "Avenir Next", "Helvetica Neue", Arial, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.92rem; color: oklch(84% 0.035 82); background: oklch(11% 0.006 95); border: 1px solid oklch(58% 0.065 82 / 0.32); border-radius: 2px; outline: none; transition: border-color 180ms cubic-bezier(0.2, 0.8, 0.2, 1); } .ds-input-text::placeholder { color: oklch(63% 0.024 82); } .ds-input-text:focus { border-color: oklch(70% 0.12 188); }

components.name: Site Navigation
components.description: Dark header nav. Champagne at rest, kinpaku on hover/active.
components.html: HomeDocs
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; gap: clamp(22px, 3vw, 48px); font-family: "Albert Sans", "Avenir Next", "Helvetica Neue", Arial, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.95rem; } .ds-nav-link { color: oklch(84% 0.035 82); text-decoration: none; transition: color 180ms cubic-bezier(0.2, 0.8, 0.2, 1); } .ds-nav-link:hover { color: oklch(84% 0.19 80.46); } .ds-nav-active { color: oklch(84% 0.19 80.46); }

components.name: Bento Tile
components.description: Flat lacquer tile inside the 12-column bento grid. No nested cards.
components.html:
01

Respects your design system.

Inherits tokens and conventions instead of overwriting them.
components.css: .ds-bento-tile { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 14px; padding: 48px; background: oklch(7% 0.006 95); border: 0; border-radius: 0; font-family: "Albert Sans", "Avenir Next", "Helvetica Neue", Arial, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-bento-num { font-family: "SFMono-Regular", "Roboto Mono", Consolas, monospace; font-size: 0.62rem; letter-spacing: 0.28em; text-transform: uppercase; color: oklch(84% 0.19 80.46); } .ds-bento-title { margin: 0; font-size: 1.18rem; font-weight: 500; color: oklch(84% 0.035 82); } .ds-bento-body { margin: 0; font-size: 1.02rem; line-height: 1.8; color: oklch(81% 0.03 82); max-width: 65ch; }

components.name: Live Picker Bar
components.description: Global live mode bar. Lacquer-deep fill, kinpaku border, carved-tile mark.
components.css: .ds-live-bar { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 2px; padding: 4px 5px; background: oklch(4% 0.004 95); border: 1.5px solid oklch(84% 0.19 80.46); border-radius: 10px; box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px oklch(78% 0.12 82 / 0.18), 0 10px 28px oklch(0% 0 0 / 0.28); font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; color: oklch(84% 0.035 82); } .ds-live-mark { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 0 12px 0 14px; color: oklch(84% 0.19 80.46); } .ds-live-toggle { padding: 6px 8px; border: none; border-radius: 7px; background: transparent; color: oklch(63% 0.024 82); font-family: inherit; font-size: 11.5px; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s ease, color 0.15s ease; } .ds-live-toggle:hover { color: oklch(84% 0.035 82); } .ds-live-toggle.is-active { background: oklch(78% 0.12 82 / 0.18); color: oklch(84% 0.19 80.46); } .ds-live-toggle:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px oklch(84% 0.19 80.46 / 0.18), 0 0 0 3px oklch(84% 0.19 80.46); }

narrative.overview: Impeccable is a dark lacquer interface marked by Japanese gold leaf and precise technical geometry. The brand should feel like a crafted object: black urushi, irregular kinpaku seams, quiet measurement marks, circuit traces, and controlled verdigris oxidation. It is refined, technical, and physical. This direction replaces the old warm-paper editorial system.
keyCharacteristics: Dark mineral and lacquer surfaces, never pure black.
Kinpaku gold as the primary accent, with true leaf texture where an element carries brand weight.
Verdigris patina as the secondary accent for state, contrast, and improved signals.
A geometric sans voice with a widely tracked wordmark, not a serif editorial voice.
Thin calibration lines, circuit geometry, and gold seams used as functional structure.
Small radii, restrained borders, and almost no decorative shadow.

rules.name: The Gold Carries Brand Rule
rules.body: Kinpaku gold is the primary brand signal. If a single accent must represent Impeccable, use gold, not magenta or cyan.

rules.name: The Patina Has Meaning Rule
rules.body: Verdigris is secondary. It marks improvement, live state, or contrast against gold. Do not use it as a generic decoration field.

rules.name: The Texture Budget Rule
rules.body: Leaf and patina textures are for brand-bearing moments: hero seams, CTA fills, dividers, major swatches, and select system modules. Generic cards stay mostly flat.

rules.name: The OKLCH-Only Rule
rules.body: New colors are declared in OKLCH. Hex appears only inside third-party examples or imported assets.

rules.name: The Weight-Inversion Rule
rules.body: Section h2s read heavier (300) than the hero h1 (100). This is deliberate: the hero is elegant and thin so the page can breathe; section anchors carry more weight to ground each block.

rules.name: The Two-Face Rule
rules.body: Display sizes use Alumni Sans — thin (100) for the h1, heavier (300) for h2s. Anything sized below 1.2rem uses Albert Sans. The thin display cut reads too light at small sizes, so it never carries body or UI text.

rules.name: The Tracked Labels Are Short Rule
rules.body: Tracked uppercase labels are for short system markers. Do not write full sentences in tracked caps.

rules.name: The Dark Type Needs Air Rule
rules.body: Body text on lacquer uses line-height 1.65 to 1.8 and a max width of 65 to 75ch.

rules.name: The Hairline First Rule
rules.body: Use 1px gold hairlines before adding shadow.

rules.name: The No Glass Rule
rules.body: Translucency can exist in overlays, but decorative blur/glass panels are not part of this system.

rules.name: The Picker Is Brand Rule
rules.body: Live mode UI is Impeccable product chrome, not host-page chrome. It always ships the full kinpaku border, lacquer-deep fill, and carved-tile mark.

dos: Do use kinpaku gold as the primary brand color.
Do use verdigris patina for secondary state and contrast.
Do keep surfaces dark, warm, and mineral.
Do use real texture assets for gold leaf and oxidation when the element is brand-bearing.
Do use circuit/calibration geometry as structure, especially around product proof.
Do keep cards compact, flat, and sharply bounded.
Do preserve utility: demos, sliders, audit tables, command examples, docs, and pricing must remain understandable.
Do keep live mode picker bars on lacquer-deep with kinpaku gold borders, regardless of host page theme.
donts: Do not use editorial magenta as a brand accent.
Do not use italic serif display typography.
Do not use purple gradients, neon cyan fields, glassmorphism, or generic AI-tool glow.
Do not put gold texture under long text.
Do not use beige, paper, or cream as the page ground.
Do not add decorative calibration marks that do not align with real content.
Do not use wide rounded cards or nested cards.
Do not use pure black or pure white.
Do not let the visual system hide the product proof.
Do not theme-adapt live mode picker chrome to match arbitrary host pages. The picker is always neo-kinpaku.
